app.name: Lazy Patta
welcome.tagline: The card games we grew up playing.
welcome.noBetting: No cash. No betting. Just family fun.
landing.nav.label: Landing navigation
landing.hero.headline: Desi card games. Family game night, anywhere.
landing.hero.body: Play Gadha Chor and Lal Satti against the computer or invite your family. No betting, no complicated setup—just masti.
landing.hero.primaryCta: Start with Gadha Chor — our easiest game
landing.hero.reducedMotionLabel: Reduced motion family card table: Gadha Chor, Lal Satti, guests, and private rooms.
landing.trust.label: Why families can play safely
landing.games.title: Two family-table classics, each with its own mood.
landing.games.body: Pick the playful unmatched-card chaos of Gadha Chor or the sequence-building strategy of Lal Satti.
landing.game.gadhaChor.description: Make pairs, draw hidden cards, and try not to be left with the odd card while the whole table reacts.
landing.game.lalSatti.description: Open each suit with its seven, build the sequence, and race to empty your hand first.
landing.mode.title: Quick solo warmups or private family rooms.
landing.mode.computer.title: Against Computer
landing.mode.computer.body: Practice the rules with computer players before everyone joins.
landing.mode.private.title: Private Family Room
landing.mode.private.body: Create a room, share the code, and gather everyone around one table.
landing.mode.pass.title: Pass and Play
landing.mode.pass.body: A same-device table mode is planned for in-person family nights.
landing.family.title: Family in different cities? Still one table.
landing.family.body: A simple room code turns scattered phones into one shared game night.
landing.family.inviteTitle: Ba invited you to Gadha Chor
landing.founder.title: Why I built Lazy Patta
landing.founder.subtitle: Bringing back the family game nights we grew up with
landing.founder.p1: I remember summer vacations when the whole family would gather—whether we were travelling, visiting relatives, or simply spending an evening at home.
landing.founder.p2: Nobody cared about the television. Phones were forgotten. A deck of cards was enough to fill the room with laughter, small rivalries, teasing, and love.
landing.founder.p3: We played the desi patta games passed down through our families. Of course, everyone wanted to win—but the best part was always being together.
landing.founder.p4: Lazy Patta is my attempt to bring a little of that feeling back.
landing.founder.p5: Whether your family is sitting around the same table or joining from different cities and countries, I hope Lazy Patta helps you pause, play, laugh, and create memories together again.
landing.founder.credit: Built by Ishani Bhatt, creator of Lazy Traveler.
landing.founder.photoAlt: Ishani Bhatt, creator of Lazy Patta
landing.coming.title: More Indian family games are warming up.
landing.footer.label: Footer navigation
landing.footer.descriptor: The Indian card games we grew up playing.
game.cardsRemainingCount: {count, plural, one {# card remaining} other {# cards remaining}}
error.recoverable: Something slipped. You can safely return to setup and try again.
computer.setupTitle: Gadha Chor at the family table
computer.setupDescription: Set a small table, meet the bots, and play a guided computer round that keeps card rules inside the controller boundary.
computer.setupInstruction: Choose your table size, then start dealing.
computer.quickRulePairs: Pairs are cleared when the controller confirms them.
computer.quickRulePick: On your turn, tap one face-down opponent card. No dragging.
computer.quickRuleLast: The last player holding the unpaired card becomes Gadha Chor.
computer.dealingInstruction: Cards are being dealt around the table.
computer.initialPairsInstruction: Initial pairs are clearing before the first turn.
computer.finishedInstruction: {name} has finished and stays visible at the table.
computer.resultInstruction: Round complete. Take a breath and play again when ready.
computer.eventInitialPairs: Opening pairs moved to the center.
computer.eventHumanTurn: Your eligible opponent cards are lifted.
computer.tablePanelSubtitle: Sound and motion stay secondary to play.
computer.gadhaChorReveal: A gentle Gadha Chor reveal, no teasing and no fake rewards.
computer.handEmpty: Your hand is empty — you have finished.
computer.youAreGadhaChor: You are the Gadha Chor this round!
computer.youDrewInstruction: You drew a card. No pair this time.
lalSatti.setupTitle: Lal Satti on the family table
lalSatti.setupDescription: The player holding 7♥ starts, each suit opens with its own seven, and everyone races to empty their hand.
lalSatti.quickRuleSevens: The player holding 7♥ starts the game.
lalSatti.quickRuleBuild: Other sevens open their suits, then cards build down toward ace and up toward king.
lalSatti.quickRulePass: Pass only when no card in your hand can be played.
lalSatti.quickRuleScoring: Scoring: cards left count by value. A=1, J=11, Q=12, K=13. Lowest total wins.
lalSatti.nameHelp: Guest scores stay on this browser. Sign in to save the scoreboard to your account.
lalSatti.accountHelp: Play as guest now, or sign in with an email code to save this scoreboard.
lalSatti.accountUnavailable: Online score saving is not configured. Guest scores stay on this browser.
lalSatti.codeSent: Check your email for the code.
lalSatti.authError: Could not complete sign-in. Check the code and try again.
lalSatti.saveScoresHelp: Saved scoreboards stay with your account.
lalSatti.saveScoresError: Could not save the scoreboard. Try again.
lalSatti.yourTurnInstruction: Play one lifted card into its suit row.
lalSatti.passInstruction: No card can be played. Pass to keep the table moving.
lalSatti.resultInstruction: Round complete. The table stays warm for a rematch.
lalSatti.scoreboardHelp: Each rematch adds a round and scores the cards left by rank value. Lowest total points leads.
lalSatti.scoreboardEmpty: Finish a round to start the session score.
lalSatti.leftoverLine: {name}: {points, plural, one {# point} other {# points}} · {count, plural, one {# card left} other {# cards left}}
lalSatti.eventResult: The Lal Satti result is ready.
lalSatti.playableCount: {count, plural, one {# playable card} other {# playable cards}}
lalSatti.invalidCardHint: That card can't be placed yet. Play a lifted card, or pass when blocked.
lalSatti.shareResultText: We played Lal Satti on Lazy Patta — {name} emptied their hand first!
tutorial.pairsBody: Cards of the same rank make a pair. Any pair in a hand is set aside automatically.
tutorial.drawBody: On your turn, tap one face-down card from another player. Just a tap — no dragging.
tutorial.autoPairBody: If the card you take matches one you already hold, the pair leaves your hand right away.
tutorial.gadhaChorBody: One card has no partner. Whoever is left holding it at the end is the Gadha Chor — all in good fun.
card.hiddenAccessible: Hidden card {position} from {name}. Card identity is not revealed.
auth.signInDescription: Play as a guest now, or use email to keep the same account later.
auth.guestDescription: Guest play works on this browser. Use email later if you want the same account on another device.
auth.codeSentTo: We sent a code to {email}. Enter it below.
auth.notConfigured: Online play is not set up in this environment yet.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

rooms.shareHint: Share this code so others can join.
rooms.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
rooms.waitingToStart: Waiting for the host to start the game…
rooms.handEmpty: You're out — your hand is empty!
rooms.youAreGadhaChor: Oh no — you're the Gadha Chor!
rooms.gadhaChorIs: {name} is left holding the odd card — the Gadha Chor!
rooms.lalSattiTurnYours: Your turn — play a card or pass
rooms.lalSattiLeftover: {name}: {points, plural, one {# point} other {# points}} · {count, plural, one {# card left} other {# cards left}}
lobby.moreGamesBody: Teen Do Paanch, Mendicot, and Judgement are next up.
games.gadhaChor.name: Gadha Chor
games.gadhaChor.description: Make pairs, draw cards, and avoid being the Gadha Chor.
games.lalSatti.name: Lal Satti
games.lalSatti.description: Play your cards in sequence and finish first.
lalSattiTutorial.sevensBody: Each suit opens with its seven, laid down first to start that suit's row.
lalSattiTutorial.sequenceBody: On your turn, play a card that extends a suit up or down from its seven — or pass if you can't.
lalSattiTutorial.winBody: First to play every card wins the round.
computer.revealSafeCount: {count, plural, one {# player stayed safe} other {# players stayed safe}}
computer.shareResultText: We played Gadha Chor on Lazy Patta — {name} was today's Gadha Chor!
